notes.mean_ari_null: ARI requires ground-truth layer labels (layer_guess). The GEO-sourced DLPFC slices (P4/P6 series) do not include these annotations. ARI=0.001 was measured on DLPFC 151507 from spatialLIBD separately (see single_slice/151507_metrics.json). Full ARI evaluation requires the 12-slice spatialLIBD download via R spatialLIBD package.
notes.mean_silhouette: Positive cross-donor transfer confirmed. P4 donor silhouette (0.200 mean) is higher than P6 donor (0.065 mean), consistent with P6 slices being noisier in their raw silhouette too.
notes.lodo_validation: LODO cross-donor silhouette = 0.132. Genes selected on training donors produce positive-silhouette clustering on held-out donors — confirming cross-donor causal invariance.
